footerBrand.tagline: Real estate investment, construction, and development — accompanying sustainable urban growth.

homeIntro.description: Established in 2010, Thien Duc Investment - Construction - Trading Co., Ltd works in real estate, construction investment, and urban development. Guided by the motto "Satisfied customers — Thien Duc's success", the company focuses on schedule, execution quality, and lasting value for every project.

strengths.title: Investment & development
strengths.description: Seeking, investing in, and developing projects with a clear direction on planning, amenities, and viability.

strengths.title: Strategic partnership
strengths.description: Connecting with partners to expand delivery capacity, optimise resources, and create lasting value.

strengths.title: Flagship project
strengths.description: Hung Phu Urban Area is a key project reflecting our urban development direction in Ben Tre.

strengths.title: Execution commitment
strengths.description: Closely tracking progress, construction quality, and transparent information throughout project development.

homeCooperation.title: Partnering with international real estate developers
homeCooperation.description: From 2014 to 2018, Thien Duc formed a strategic partnership with CapitaLand Group (Singapore), co-developing and delivering international-standard premium apartment complexes in Ho Chi Minh City.

homeContact.title: Discuss projects, partnerships, or advisory needs

about.heroDescription: Thien Duc Investment Construction Trading Co., Ltd was established in 2010, operating in investment, construction, trading, and real estate development in Ho Chi Minh City and the southern provinces. Over 16 years of growth, it has partnered with CapitaLand and is now the developer of the Hung Phu Urban Area in Ben Tre.
about.overviewTitle: An investment and project-development partner with a prudent, sustainable approach
overviewParagraphs: Thien Duc was established in 2010 by a team of experts, architects, and engineers with many years of experience in Vietnam's construction industry.

The 2014-2018 period marked a turning point when the company formed a strategic partnership with the international real estate group CapitaLand, successfully developing and delivering international-standard premium apartment complexes in Ho Chi Minh City.
From 2018 to today, Thien Duc has expanded its land bank and developer role into the southern provinces, notably a large-scale urban area in Ben Tre province.
about.imageAlt: A real estate project developed by Thien Duc

stats.label: Major mixed-use projects
stats.note: Along with many civil infrastructure works

timeline.title: Establishment
timeline.description: A team of experts, architects, and engineers with many years of experience in Vietnam's construction industry co-founded the company.

timeline.title: International cooperation
timeline.description: Formed a strategic partnership with CapitaLand Group (Singapore), developing and delivering international-standard premium apartment complexes in Ho Chi Minh City.

timeline.title: Expanding the developer role
timeline.description: Expanded its land bank into the southern provinces, notably large-scale urban area projects in Ben Tre province.

principles.title: Vision
principles.description: To become a leading, reputable real estate investment and construction brand in Vietnam, creating works with breakthrough architectural solutions, high aesthetics, and lasting sustainability.

principles.title: Mission
principles.description: To deliver premium, absolutely safe living solutions and spaces for customers; to apply advanced techniques and new materials to optimise economic efficiency for partners; and to accompany the nation's modern urban infrastructure development.

principles.title: Core values
principles.description: Reputation — Quality — Breakthrough — Sustainability: the four foundational values behind every investment, construction, and partnership activity of Thien Duc.

about.fieldsDescription: The areas are presented by business line group within the operating objectives and registered business lines of Thien Duc Company.

fields.title: Real estate business
fields.description: Real estate business and land-use rights owned, held, or leased; leasing of offices and workshops.

fields.title: Construction works
fields.description: Construction of all types of buildings; road and transport works; civil engineering works; site preparation; construction finishing.

fields.title: Architecture & engineering consulting
fields.description: Supervision of construction and finishing of civil and industrial works; structural design of civil and industrial construction works.

fields.title: Materials & equipment trading
fields.description: Wholesale of iron and steel; machinery, equipment, and spare parts for mining and construction.

fields.title: Freight transport
fields.description: Freight transport by road and inland waterway.

fields.title: Shipbuilding & floating structures
fields.description: Building of ships and floating structures per registered business lines (not operated at the head office).

process.title: Receive
process.description: Record your information from the form, phone, or email.

process.title: Sort

process.title: Respond
